parameters.content:
**Node 1 — Google Drive Trigger**
Polls 'Incoming CSVs' folder every 1 min. Sophia must upload via drive.google.com — desktop sync won't trigger reliably.

**Node 2 — File Validation**
Checks filename ends with .csv. Rejects non-CSV files to false branch (Invalid File Alert). Pattern: {domain}_issues_{YYYYMMDD}.csv

**Node 2b — Invalid File Alert**
False branch only. Emails Owen if a non-CSV file is uploaded. No report generated.

parameters.subject: =SEO Automation: Invalid file uploaded — {{ $json.name }}
parameters.message:
=A file named "{{ $json.name }}" was uploaded to the SEO automation folder but is not a CSV.

No report was generated. Please check the file and re-upload a valid .csv export from SEMrush.

parameters.content:
**Node 5 — Data Extraction (CORE)**
Matches CSV rows by 'Issue' column, reads 'Failed checks'. 20 output fields. Client name mapped from filename domain. Add new clients to nameMap object.

**Node 6+7 — Copy & Populate Template**
Copies master Google Doc to Report Drafts folder, replaces all 20 {{placeholders}}. Plain text only. Template ID: 1n3_hajw-ACLMJ-xM3qeuSMPSaCEZb7UqyJZzVK6xrnc

**Node 8 — Success Notification**
Emails Sophia with link to draft. Owen CC'd. Sophia then reviews, adds health score, applies branding, exports PDF.

parameters.subject: =SEO Report Draft Ready — {{ $('Data Extraction').first().json.client_name }} — {{ $('Data Extraction').first().json.report_date }}
parameters.message:
=

Hi Sophia,

Your SEO Report draft for {{ $('Data Extraction').first().json.client_name }} ({{ $('Data Extraction').first().json.client_url }}) is ready for review.

Open the report draft in Google Docs

Next steps:

  • Review all auto-populated values
  • Enter the Site Health Score from SEMrush
  • Add your analysis and recommendations
  • Apply branding and export as PDF

This is an automated notification from the SEO Report Automation system.

parameters.content:
**Node 9 — Global Error Handler**
Catches ANY unhandled error across the workflow. Emails Owen with node name, error, and execution ID. FAIL LOUDLY — no silent failures.

parameters.subject: =SEO Automation ERROR — {{ $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm') }}
parameters.message:
=

SEO Report Automation — Error Alert

An error occurred in the workflow.

Error: {{ $json.execution.error.message || 'No details available' }}

Execution ID: {{ $json.execution.id || 'N/A' }}

Check the n8n execution log for details.
